title: Playing Board Games 玩桌游
scene: Ben和Dan在客厅一起玩大富翁桌游。

lines.en: Dan, do you want to play Monopoly?
Sure! I love board games. Let me set it up.
lines.zh: 当然！我喜欢桌游。我来摆好。

lines.en: I want to be the car. What do you want?
I will be the dog. Can I go first?
I got a six! I am moving six spaces.
You landed on Park Place. That is my property!
lines.zh: 你到了公园广场。那是我的地盘！

lines.en: Oh no! How much do I pay you?
This game is so fun. Let us play again next time!
lines.zh: 这个游戏真好玩。下次我们再玩！
